acceptance_criteria.text: Run a real NVDA walkthrough on Windows across dashboard, track switcher, learning paths, lesson reader, practice, PBQ Lab, mock setup, mock review, flashcards, analytics, notes, and preferences.
Document any screen-reader blockers with file/line references or reproducible steps, then fix P0/P1 issues discovered during the walkthrough.
Verify focus order, landmark navigation, dialog announcements, menu dismissal, form labels, chart/heatmap names, PBQ controls, and live feedback announcements.
Add or extend automated accessibility checks for any screen-reader regression that can be cheaply detected.
Create an accessibility audit record with assistive technology version, browser/WebView context, evidence, findings, fixes, and residual risks.
